calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Erica Cooper, Esq. for Adair McClatchy (Petitioner);
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court stated that it received the notice of settlement. Ms. Cooper confirmed that the dismissal had been submitted for filing. The Court continues both matters two weeks to allow time for the dismissal to be processed.

Today's Case Management Hearing and the Petition to Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. McClatchy and Appoint Susan B. McClatchy as Successor Co-Trustee are continued to December 14, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ceclia Castellanos. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Lozado. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Continued To Feb-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Continued To Nov-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erica Cooper, via Zoom, for Adair McClatchy, Petitioner; Brian Connors, via Zoom, for Carlos McClatchy, Respondent.

The court points to the apparent lack of development in this matter since it was last scheduled for hearing. Mr. Connors reports that the parties are actively working on resolving this matter and are in the process of scheduling a mediation. Mr. Connors advises that the parties have agreed to continue the trial which will conserve judicial resources and save the parties the expense and time required to prepare for an evidentiary hearing. Mr. Connors requests that the court continue the trial scheduled for Nov-30-2022 and advises that an application can be filed unless the court is willing to move the trial on its own motion. The court advises that it will consider Mr. Connor's request. Ms. Cooper offers testimony regarding the status of previously frozen trust assets and confirms Mr. Connor's report regarding mediation and of the intention to attempt to resolve the matter to avoid litigation between family members. After additional conversation, the court advises that it will continue the trial date but not to expect any additional continuances.

The petition to remove co-Trustee, etc., and Case Management Hearing are continued to Nov-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The trial set for the same date is continued to Feb-08-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a new Joint Case Management Statement before Nov-30-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Continued To Nov-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Continued To Sep-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erica Cooper, in person, for Adair McClatchy, Petitioner; Brian Connors, via Zoom, for Carlos McClatchy, Objector.

The court advises Mr. Connors that it would be helpful for him to be clearer regarding claims, applicable laws, and spelling-out statute of limitations in the next joint Case Management Statement. Ms. Cooper advises that the parties continue to meet and confer regarding ADR. Mr. Connors agrees with Ms. Cooper but reports on an issue where it appears as though the trust is paying for Petitioner's legal expenses and believes that if that is the case, the trust should also be paying for his client's legal expenses. The court advises that it believes Mr. Cooper can file a noticed petition regarding the preceding.

The Case Management Hearing is taken off calendar. The Petition is continued to Sep-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erica Cooper, via ZOOM, for Adair McClatchy, Petitioner; Brian Connors, via ZOOM, for Carlos McClatchy, Objector.

The court addresses the joint case management statement filed by the parties and notes concerns regarding the status of discovery and the request to consolidate which the court advises will likely not be granted by the court if a petition is filed to do so. There is discussion between the court and counsel regarding their respective positions concerning ADR with counsel reporting that they are amenable to engage in ADR if the trust pays for it.

After additional discussion, the Case Management Hearing is taken off calendar. The Petition to Remove, etc., is continued to Jun-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Continued To Mar-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-12-2022 Continued To Jan-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Graham, via ZOOM, for Adair McClatchy; Brian Connors, via ZOOM, for Carlos McClatchy, Respondent.

The court and counsel discuss their respective positions in this matter including, but not limited to, a possible evidentiary hearing and status of discovery and the request to suspend Carlos McClatchy as Trustee and appoint Susan McClatchy Successor Trustee. The court advises that it is not prepared to rule on the instant petition at this time and advises counsel that the court will be issuing a Case Management Order.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Remove, etc., is continued to Mar-09-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: S. Saephan. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-15-2021 Continued To Jan-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Remove Or Suspend Co-Trustee Carlos F. Mcclatchy And Appoint Susan B. Mcclatchy As Successor Co-Trustee; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-13-2021 Denied

Petition Of Co-Trustee To Appoint Successor Co-Trustee.
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-12-295441 The Grace Briggs Trust.

Appearances: Michael Graham for and with Adair McClathcy and Susan McClatchy. Colleen McAvoy for and with Carlos McClatchy.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Petition For Order Confirming Trust Names in the Briggs Trust matter was granted (subject to review of the order/said order was reviewed in open Court by Ms. McAvoy), and the Petition to Appoint Successor Co-Trustee in the Conley Trust matter was denied without prejudice. Ms. McAvoy is to prepare the order in the Conley matter.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.
